product.name: Aramid D2 260
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkane tkaniny aramidowe serii D do odzieży trudnopalnej
product.familyDescriptorEn: Woven D-series aramid fabrics for FR workwear
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Aramid Workwear Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: Aramid Fabric, 93% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 260 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 260 g/m², 93% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
descriptions: for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
Aramid Fabric, 93% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 260 gr/m'2
260 g/m², 93% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 93% m-Aramid (m-AR) 5% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 1500N; Weft > 1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>70N ; Weft>60N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612
applicationImageLabels: Aramid Arc Protective Overalls with Class 2 certification.

evidence: for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicitly described for wildland firefighters and firefighter costumes, with EN 15614 forest firefighting certification.
Explicit EN ISO 11611 welding protection certification directly supports welding application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Explicit oil and gas industry use plus certified electric-arc protection (EN 61482) directly support the energy sector application.
No explicit military, police or tactical use stated; only generic FR workwear and industrial applications mentioned.

evidence: for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
primary.rationale: The product explicitly states firefighter costumes and forest/wildland firefighter certification (EN 15614), making firefighting the most direct and dominant stated end use.

secondary.rationale: EN ISO 11611 welding protection is explicitly certified, independently supporting a welding/metal industry application alongside firefighting.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Oil and gas industry mention and EN 61482 arc protection are present but antistatic/arc properties alone are insufficient per rules to establish energy as primary or secondary when firefighting and welding are more explicitly and directly stated.
Too generic; narrower explicit sectors (firefighting, welding) dominate the stated use.
No explicit military, police or tactical use stated in the source data.
